fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the application area that the analysis view belongs to:
Sales: The analysis view was set up for Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis view was set up for Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis view was set up for Inventory

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the analysis view.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the analysis view.

fields.name: Last Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the last item ledger entry you posted, prior to updating the analysis view.

fields.name: Last Budget Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the last item budget entry you entered prior to updating the analysis view.

fields.name: Last Date Updated
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the analysis view was last updated.

fields.name: Update on Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the analysis view is updated every time that you post an item ledger entry, for example from a sales invoice.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Item Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter to specify the items that will be included in an analysis view.

fields.name: Location Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a location filter to specify that only entries posted to a particular location are to be included in an analysis view.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which item ledger entries will be included in an analysis view.

fields.name: Date Compression
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period that the program will combine entries for, in order to create a single entry for that time period.

fields.name: Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies one of the four dimensions that you can include in an analysis view.

fields.name: Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies one of the four dimensions that you can include in an analysis view.

fields.name: Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies one of the four dimensions that you can include in an analysis view.

fields.name: Include Budgets
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to include an update of analysis view budget entries, when updating an analysis view.
